characters.appearance: A fair-skinned human hand and forearm. The hand has short, neatly trimmed, unpainted fingernails.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing is visible on the forearm.
characters.demeanor: Deliberate and precise, tapping specific areas of the screen.

scenes.supernova_script:
Narrator says: रोज़ सिर्फ 10 मिनट Supernova के साथ English practice करें। [Practice English for just 10 minutes daily with Supernova.]
App Voice says: All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others. [All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others.]
App Voice says: equal [equal]
App Voice says: important [important]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the core habit of daily 10-minute English practice.
- Demonstrates the interactive reading and pronunciation feature.
- Establishes Supernova as an accessible tool for learning new vocabulary in context.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट English पढ़ें और बोलें (Read and speak English 10 minutes a day)
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
equal [ˈiːkwəl] समान (equal) सीख लिया (Learned) सीखें (Learn)
important [ɪmˈpɔːrtnt] ज़रूरी (important) सीख लिया (Learned) सीखें (Learn)

scenes.supernova_script:
App Voice says: One of them read slowly. [One of them read slowly.]
App Voice says: slowly [slowly]
App Voice says: The animals stood silent in the cold [The animals stood silent in the cold]
App Voice says: cold [cold]
App Voice says: night, staring at the wall. They tried [night, staring at the wall. They tried]
App Voice says: to try [to try]
App Voice says: to remember the old words, [to remember the old words,]
App Voice says: word [word]
Narrator says: मुश्किल शब्दों पर tap करें और उनका सही pronunciation सीखें। [Tap on difficult words and learn their correct pronunciation.]
App Voice says: but something [but something]
App Voice says: something [something]
App Voice says: felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm [felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm]
App Voice says: farm [farm]
App Voice says: looked the same as always, [looked the same as always,]
App Voice says: always [always]
Narrator says: आज ही Supernova के साथ confidence से English बोलना शुरू करें! [Start speaking English with confidence with Supernova today!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Continues demonstrating the interactive reading feature with a focus on pronunciation.
- Highlights the practical benefit of tapping words to overcome hesitation.
- Ends with a strong, encouraging call to action to build speaking confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट English पढ़ें और बोलें (Read and speak English 10 minutes a day)
एनिमल फार्म जॉर्ज ऑरवेल (Animal Farm George Orwell)
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
slowly [ˈsloʊli] धीरे-धीरे (slowly) सीख लिया (Learned) सीखें (Learn)
cold [koʊld] ठंडा (cold) सीख लिया (Learned) सीखें (Learn)
to try [tə traɪ] कोशिश करना (try) सीख लिया (Learned) सीखें (Learn)
word [wɜːrd] शब्द (word) सीख लिया (Learned) सीखें (Learn)
something [ˈsʌmθɪŋ] कुछ (something) सीख लिया (Learned) सीखें (Learn)
farm [fɑːrm] खेत (farm) सीख लिया (Learned) सीखें (Learn)
always [ˈɔːlweɪz] हमेशा (always) सीख लिया (Learned) सीखें (Learn)
